socialProof.testimonial1: It opened my eyes about my sleep routine. Incredibly accurate.
socialProof.testimonial2: The action plan is super concrete. I've been applying it for 2 weeks now.
socialProof.testimonial3: I thought it was another generic quiz but the analysis is very personal.
socialProof.testimonial4: My hydration was at 40% and I had no idea. Now I drink 2L daily without effort.
socialProof.testimonial5: The best part is the tracking. You see yourself improving week by week with real data.
socialProof.testimonial6: I recommended it to my whole family. My mom improved her score by 25% in a month.
socialProof.testimonial7: It only took 4 minutes and the result was more useful than any visit to a nutritionist.
socialProof.testimonial8: I discovered my weak point was rest. Changed one habit and I already sleep better.
socialProof.testimonial9: I love the wellness radar. Seeing my strengths and weaknesses on a chart is amazing.
socialProof.testimonial10: Did it out of curiosity and ended up changing 3 habits. My energy has totally changed.
socialProof.testimonial11: It's like having a health coach in your pocket. And it's free. I couldn't believe it.
socialProof.testimonial12: My partner and I did it together. Now we compete to improve our scores.
socialProof.testimonial13: Been following the plan for a month and lost 3 kg without dieting. Just better habits.
socialProof.testimonial14: The stress analysis was eye-opening. I didn't know I was so far above average.
socialProof.testimonial15: I'm a doctor and was surprised by the quality of the analysis. I recommend it to patients.
socialProof.testimonial16: The best part: the action plan. It's not generic, it adapts to your real weak points.
socialProof.testimonial17: I've done the diagnosis 3 times and I can see my improvement each time. Very motivating.
socialProof.testimonial18: My friends and I did it as a group. It was fun comparing results.
socialProof.testimonial19: Never thought sleeping 30 min more would change so much. This diagnosis opened my eyes.
socialProof.testimonial20: Simple, fast, and useful. I wish I had found it sooner.

howItWorksV2.title: How it works
howItWorksV2.step1Desc: 17 interactive questions about your daily habits. No boring forms.
howItWorksV2.step2Desc: We analyze your answers and create a unique profile of your habits and wellness.
howItWorksV2.step3Desc: Get your score, areas for improvement, 30-day plan, and habit tracking.

faq.title: Common questions.
faq.a1: Yes, completely free. 17 interactive questions, no mandatory signup. You get a score, an area-by-area analysis, and a personalized plan.
faq.q2: What is the analysis based on?
faq.a2: We analyze your answers across 6 key areas: sleep, nutrition, exercise, stress, hydration, and productivity. The result tells you where you stand and what to improve first.
faq.a3: A habits and wellness content creator with 93K+ followers and 35M+ views. The shop only sells products he personally uses and recommends.
faq.q4: Can I track my progress afterwards?
faq.a4: Yes. After the diagnosis you can access a dashboard with habit tracking, activity heatmap, and reminders to stay consistent.
faq.q5: Why should I trust these products?
faq.a5: Every product in the shop is something I personally use. No endless catalogs or random brand deals. If it's on Ophyra, it's because it works.
faq.q6: What's the relationship between the shop and the diagnosis?
faq.a6: They're independent. The diagnosis analyzes your habits for free. The shop has products I use and recommend. You can use one, the other, or both.

shopSection.title: What I use.
shopSection.subtitle: No endless catalogs or random referrals. Products selected one by one, categorized by the area they help you improve.
